'''javodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemonicist|mnemonicist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemonicist|mnemonicist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| javodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jævedeth|jævedeth]] || [[word:jævedej|jævedej]] || [[word:jævedesh|jævedesh]] || [[word:jævede|jævede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:javovodoth|javovodoth]] || [[word:javovodoj|javovodoj]] || [[word:javovodosh|javovodosh]] || [[word:javovodo|javovodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:javodoth|javodoth]] || [[word:javodoj|javodoj]] || [[word:javodosh|javodosh]] || [[word:javodo|javodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:javofdoth|javofdoth]] || [[word:javofdoj|javofdoj]] || [[word:javofdosh|javofdosh]] || [[word:javofdof|javofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:javodotho|javodotho]] || [[word:javodojo|javodojo]] || [[word:javodosho|javodosho]] || [[word:javodoko|javodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:javodoth|javodoth]] || [[word:javodoj|javodoj]] || [[word:javodosh|javodosh]] || [[word:javodo|javodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:javodothol|javodothol]] || [[word:javodojol|javodojol]] || [[word:javodoshol|javodoshol]] || [[word:javodokol|javodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:javodothotho|javodothotho]] || [[word:javodojojo|javodojojo]] || [[word:javodoshosho|javodoshosho]] || [[word:javodoko|javodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:javodothon|javodothon]] || [[word:javodojon|javodojon]] || [[word:javodoshon|javodoshon]] || [[word:javodokon|javodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:javodothoro|javodothoro]] || [[word:javodojoro|javodojoro]] || [[word:javodoshoro|javodoshoro]] || [[word:javodokoro|javodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
